---
title: "Course Schedule"
subtitle: "BMC201 - Web Technology"
sidebar: false
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

::: {.schedule-page}

Here's your roadmap for the semester!

- [**Presentations**](/presentations/index.qmd) ({{< fa desktop >}}): Lecture slides and presentations for each class session.

- [**Content**](/content/index.qmd) ({{< fa book-open-reader >}}): This page contains lecture materials, readings, and videos for each topic. Read and watch these.

- [**Labs**](/labs/index.qmd) ({{< fa flask >}}): Hands-on lab exercises with step-by-step instructions (3-hour sessions weekly).

- [**Assignments**](/assignment/index.qmd) ({{< fa pen-ruler >}}): Regular assignments with due dates. Complete these to practice what you've learned.

- [**Quizzes**](/quiz/index.qmd) ({{< fa list-check >}}): Use pre-class quizzes to quickly check understanding before lecture delivery.

- [**Resources**](/resource/index.qmd) ({{< fa books >}}): Additional learning materials and references.

---

## Course Overview

**Course Code:** BMC201  
**Course Name:** Web Technology  
**Semester:** II  
**Credits:** 4 (3 Lectures - 1 Tutorial - 0 Practical)  
**Teaching Structure:** 4 Classes/Week + 1 Lab Session (3 hours)/Week  
**Academic Year:** 2025-26  
**Duration:** January 26 - May 3, 2026

---

## Assessment Structure (AKTU Format)

| Component | Marks |
|-----------|-------|
| Class Test (CT) | 20 |
| Teacher Assessment (TA) | 10 |
| **Sessional Subtotal** | **30** |
| End-Semester Exam (ESE) | 70 |
| **Total** | **100** |

---

### Week 1: Jan 26 - Feb 1, 2026 {.unlisted}

**Unit I: Web Page Designing - Introduction**

|  | Topic | Slides | Content | Pre-Class Quiz | Advanced Quiz (Post-Class) | Labs | Assignments | Due |
|--|-------|--------|---------|----------------|----------------------------|------|-------------|-----|
| *Lecture 1* | Introduction to Web Designing | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/lecture-01.qmd) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-01.qmd) | [{{< fa list-check >}}](/quiz/lecture-01-quiz.qmd) | Planned | | | |
| *Lecture 2* | History of Web & Internet | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/lecture-02.qmd) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-01.qmd) | [{{< fa list-check >}}](/quiz/lecture-02-quiz.qmd) | Planned | | | |
| *Lecture 3* | HTML Basics & Structure | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/lecture-03.qmd) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-01.qmd) | [{{< fa list-check >}}](/quiz/lecture-03-quiz.qmd) | Planned | | | |
| *Lecture 4* | HTML Grouping: Div & Span | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/lecture-04.qmd) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-01.qmd) | [{{< fa list-check >}}](/quiz/lecture-04-quiz.qmd) | Planned | | | |
| *Lab 1* | Development Environment Setup | | | | | [{{< fa flask >}}](/labs/lab-01.qmd) | | **Jan 28** |

: {tbl-colwidths="[10,24,8,10,10,14,8,8,8]"}

---

### Week 2: Feb 2 - Feb 8, 2026 {.unlisted}

**Unit I: HTML Forms & CSS Introduction**

|  | Topic | Slides | Content | Labs | Assignments | Due |
|--|-------|--------|---------|------|-------------|-----|
| *Lecture 5* | HTML Lists & Images | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/lecture-05.qmd) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-02.qmd) | | | |
| *Lecture 6* | HTML Hyperlinks & Tables | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/lecture-06.qmd) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-02.qmd) | | | |
| *Lecture 7* | HTML Forms & Form Elements | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/lecture-07.qmd) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-02.qmd) | | | |
| *Lecture 8* | Introduction to CSS | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/lecture-08.qmd) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-02.qmd) | | | |
| *Lab 2* | HTML Forms & Multimedia | | | [{{< fa flask >}}](/labs/lab-02.qmd) | | **Feb 11** |
| *Assignment 1* | HTML Website with Forms | | | | [{{< fa pen-ruler >}}](/assignment/01-assignment.qmd) | **Feb 11** |

: {tbl-colwidths="[12,30,10,10,8,15,15]"}

---

### Week 3: Feb 9 - Feb 15, 2026 {.unlisted}

**Unit I: CSS Styling & Unit II: JavaScript**

|  | Topic | Slides | Content | Labs | Assignments | Due |
|--|-------|--------|---------|------|-------------|-----|
| *Lecture 9* | CSS Units & Advanced Selectors | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/lecture-09.qmd) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-03.qmd) | | | |
| *Lecture 10* | CSS Box Model & Positioning | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/lecture-10.qmd) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-03.qmd) | | | |
| *Lecture 11* | Bootstrap Framework | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/lecture-11.qmd) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-03.qmd) | | | |
| *Lecture 12* | JavaScript: Variables & Data Types | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/lecture-12.qmd) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-03.qmd) | | | |
| *Lab 3* | CSS Styling & Responsive Design | | | [{{< fa flask >}}](/labs/lab-03.qmd) | | **Feb 26** |

: {tbl-colwidths="[12,30,10,10,8,15,15]"}

---

### Week 4: Feb 16 - Feb 22, 2026 {.unlisted}

**Unit II: JavaScript Functions & Events**

|  | Topic | Slides | Content | Labs | Assignments | Due |
|--|-------|--------|---------|------|-------------|-----|
| *Lecture 13* | JavaScript Functions & Events | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-04.qmd) | | | |
| *Lecture 14* | Conditions & Looping | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-04.qmd) | | | |
| *Lecture 15* | Block Scope & Objects | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-04.qmd) | | | |
| *Lecture 16* | Arrow Functions & Callbacks | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-04.qmd) | | | |
| *Lab 4* | JavaScript Functions & Events | | | [{{< fa flask >}}](/labs/index.qmd) | | **Feb 18** |

: {tbl-colwidths="[12,30,10,10,8,15,15]"}

---

### Week 5: Feb 23 - Mar 1, 2026 {.unlisted}

**Unit II: DOM Manipulation**

|  | Topic | Slides | Content | Labs | Assignments | Due |
|--|-------|--------|---------|------|-------------|-----|
| *Lecture 17* | DOM Manipulation & Array Methods | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-05.qmd) | | | |
| *Lecture 18* | Form Validation | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-05.qmd) | | | |
| *Lecture 19* | ES6+ Features | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-05.qmd) | | | |
| *Lecture 20* | Revision: Units I & II | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | | | | |
| *Lab 5* | DOM Manipulation & Interactive Pages | | | [{{< fa flask >}}](/labs/index.qmd) | | **Feb 25** |
| *Assignment 2* | Interactive Web Page | | | | [{{< fa pen-ruler >}}](/assignment/02-assignment.qmd) | **Feb 25** |

: {tbl-colwidths="[12,30,10,10,8,15,15]"}

---

### Weeks 6-7: Mar 2 - Mar 14, 2026 {.unlisted}

**Mid-Semester Examination**

|  | Topic | Slides | Content | Labs | Assignments | Due |
|--|-------|--------|---------|------|-------------|-----|
| *Revision* | Unit I: Web Page Designing | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-06.qmd) | | | |
| *Revision* | Unit II: JavaScript | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-06.qmd) | | | |
| *Mid-Sem Exam* | Written Test on Units I & II | | | | | **Mar 10-14** |

: {tbl-colwidths="[12,30,10,10,8,15,15]"}

---

### Week 8: Mar 16 - Mar 22, 2026 {.unlisted}

**Unit III: JSP & Servlets Introduction**

|  | Topic | Slides | Content | Labs | Assignments | Due |
|--|-------|--------|---------|------|-------------|-----|
| *Lecture 21* | Servlet Architecture & Lifecycle | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-08.qmd) | | | |
| *Lecture 22* | HTTP GET & POST Requests | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-08.qmd) | | | |
| *Lecture 23* | Session Tracking & Cookies | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-08.qmd) | | | |
| *Lecture 24* | Introduction to JSP | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-08.qmd) | | | |
| *Lab 6* | Servlet Development | | | [{{< fa flask >}}](/labs/index.qmd) | | **Mar 18** |
| *Assignment 3* | Responsive Website | | | | [{{< fa pen-ruler >}}](/assignment/03-assignment.qmd) | **Mar 18** |

: {tbl-colwidths="[12,30,10,10,8,15,15]"}

---

### Week 9: Mar 23 - Mar 29, 2026 {.unlisted}

**Unit III: JSP Advanced & MVC**

|  | Topic | Slides | Content | Labs | Assignments | Due |
|--|-------|--------|---------|------|-------------|-----|
| *Lecture 25* | JSP Implicit Objects & Directives | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-09.qmd) | | | |
| *Lecture 26* | JSP Standard Actions & JSTL | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-09.qmd) | | | |
| *Lecture 27* | MVC Architecture | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-09.qmd) | | | |
| *Lecture 28* | Database Connectivity with JDBC | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-09.qmd) | | | |
| *Lab 7* | JSP Pages & Database Integration | | | [{{< fa flask >}}](/labs/index.qmd) | | **Mar 25** |

: {tbl-colwidths="[12,30,10,10,8,15,15]"}

---

### Week 10: Mar 30 - Apr 5, 2026 {.unlisted}

**Unit IV: Spring Framework**

|  | Topic | Slides | Content | Labs | Assignments | Due |
|--|-------|--------|---------|------|-------------|-----|
| *Lecture 29* | Spring Framework & Dependency Injection | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-10.qmd) | | | |
| *Lecture 30* | Spring Beans & Application Context | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-10.qmd) | | | |
| *Lecture 31* | Aspect-Oriented Programming (AOP) | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-10.qmd) | | | |
| *Lecture 32* | Spring MVC Overview | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-10.qmd) | | | |
| *Lab 8* | Spring Framework Application | | | [{{< fa flask >}}](/labs/index.qmd) | | **Apr 1** |
| *Assignment 4* | Web App with Servlets & JSP | | | | [{{< fa pen-ruler >}}](/assignment/04-assignment.qmd) | **Apr 8** |

: {tbl-colwidths="[12,30,10,10,8,15,15]"}

---

### Week 11: Apr 6 - Apr 12, 2026 {.unlisted}

**Unit IV-V: Spring Framework & Spring Boot**

|  | Topic | Slides | Content | Labs | Assignments | Due |
|--|-------|--------|---------|------|-------------|-----|
| *Lecture 33* | Spring Data & ORM Integration | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-11.qmd) | | | |
| *Lecture 34* | Spring Security | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-11.qmd) | | | |
| *Lecture 35* | Introduction to Spring Boot | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-11.qmd) | | | |
| *Lecture 36* | Building REST APIs with Spring Boot | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-11.qmd) | | | |
| *Lab 9* | Spring Boot Application | | | [{{< fa flask >}}](/labs/index.qmd) | | **Apr 8** |

: {tbl-colwidths="[12,30,10,10,8,15,15]"}

---

### Week 12: Apr 13 - Apr 19, 2026 {.unlisted}

**Unit V: Spring Boot & REST Services**

|  | Topic | Slides | Content | Labs | Assignments | Due |
|--|-------|--------|---------|------|-------------|-----|
| *Lecture 37* | REST API Best Practices | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-12.qmd) | | | |
| *Lecture 38* | Testing in Spring Boot | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-12.qmd) | | | |
| *Lecture 39* | Deployment & Production | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | [{{< fa book-open-reader >}}](/content/week-12.qmd) | | | |
| *Lecture 40* | Final Project Discussion & Revision | [{{< fa desktop >}}](/presentations/) | | | | |
| *Final Project* | Complete Web Application | | | | [{{< fa pen-ruler >}}](/assignment/index.qmd) | **Apr 19** |

: {tbl-colwidths="[12,30,10,10,8,15,15]"}

---

## Important Dates Summary

| Date | Event |
|------|-------|
| January 26, 2026 | Semester Begins |
| January 28, 2026 | Lab 1 Due |
| February 4, 2026 | Lab 2 Due |
| February 11, 2026 | Lab 3 & **Assignment 1 Due** |
| February 18, 2026 | Lab 4 Due |
| February 25, 2026 | Lab 5 & **Assignment 2 Due** |
| March 10-14, 2026 | **Mid-Semester Examination** |
| March 18, 2026 | Lab 6 & **Assignment 3 Due** |
| March 25, 2026 | Lab 7 Due |
| April 1, 2026 | Lab 8 Due |
| April 8, 2026 | Lab 9 & **Assignment 4 Due** |
| April 19, 2026 | **Final Project Due** |
| April 21 - May 3, 2026 | **End-Semester Examination** |

---

## How to Use This Schedule

**Weekly Structure:**

- **4 Classes per week**: View presentation slides ({{< fa desktop >}}) and review content pages ({{< fa book-open-reader >}}) for lecture materials
- **Pre-class quiz checks**: Use quiz links ({{< fa list-check >}}) from the schedule table before presenting each topic
- **1 Lab per week**: Attend 3-hour hands-on lab sessions ({{< fa flask >}})
- **Assignments**: Complete assignments ({{< fa pen-ruler >}}) by checking content and referencing materials
- **Advanced post-class quiz**: Marked as `Planned` now; will be linked after class evaluation set is created

**Process for each topic:**

1. View the presentation slides ({{< fa desktop >}})
2. Run the pre-class quiz check ({{< fa list-check >}})
3. Read the content page ({{< fa book-open-reader >}})
4. Complete lab exercises ({{< fa flask >}})
5. Work on assignments ({{< fa pen-ruler >}}) using references from content
6. Use advanced post-class quiz once published

:::
